title: 5 x Fairy Original Washing Up Liquid 320ml Bottles – Concentrated Powerful Grease-Cutting Dishwashing Liquid with Long-Lasting Fresh Scent – Gentle on Hands Kitchen Cleaning Essential + Epished Guides
features: Complete cleaning bundle: includes 5 x 320ml bottles of Fairy Original Washing Up Liquid plus the exclusive Epished Cleaning Guide, designed to deliver professional dishwashing results every time.
Powerful grease cutting formula: concentrated liquid removes stubborn grease, grime and baked-on food fast, leaving dishes, glasses and cookware sparkling clean with minimal effort.
Long lasting and economical: just one drop cleans more dishes thanks to the highly concentrated formulation that delivers superior cleaning power while saving time, water and effort.
Gentle on hands and surfaces: dermatologically tested formula suitable for daily use, providing effective cleaning without harshness or irritation, ideal for households and professional kitchens.
Epished Cleaning Guide included: features expert tips and step-by-step methods for optimal washing, eco-efficient cleaning, and maintaining a spotless, fresh kitchen with every wash.
description: Product description Keep your kitchen sparkling and your dishes spotless with the Fairy Original Washing Up Liquid 5 x 320ml Pack , complete with the exclusive Epished Cleaning Guide . Designed for exceptional cleaning power, Fairy’s concentrated formula cuts through even the toughest grease and grime with ease, leaving your dishes, glassware and utensils shining clean every time. Each bottle delivers powerful grease-cutting action using Fairy’s advanced surfactant technology that quickly breaks down oils, fats and stubborn residues. A small amount goes a long way, ensuring lasting cleaning performance that helps you save money while maintaining a spotless kitchen. The long-lasting fresh scent leaves dishes smelling clean and pleasant after every wash. Included in this set is the Epished Guide – a complete cleaning companion offering expert tips and practical steps for achieving professional cleaning results in your home. The guide provides valuable advice on efficient washing techniques, water temperature optimisation, dish stacking, and eco-conscious cleaning habits to maximise every drop of Fairy Original Liquid. Ideal for daily dishwashing, tough grease removal, and multipurpose surface cleaning , these 320ml bottles are compact, easy to use, and perfect for homes, offices, cafes and catering setups. The gentle-on-hands formula makes it suitable for frequent use without dryness or irritation, while its biodegradable composition supports a more sustainable clean. Experience unbeatable performance, shine and value with the Fairy Original Washing Up Liquid 5 Pack + Epished Guide – the ultimate kitchen cleaning bundle for powerful, efficient and eco-friendly dish care. Ingredients Quartz,Sodium Carbonate,Soap, Glycerin,Sodium, Bicarbonate
